The '''700-Penetrator''' was a military grade<ref name="DEII-5">[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]]</ref> [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]<ref name="EGVV" /> developed around the time of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] return. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Lo Khan]]<ref name="DEII-5" /> installed a pair of 700-Penetrators on his [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|''Xiytiar''-class transport]] ''[[Hyperspace Marauder]]'' after [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of flying his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] without armaments.<ref name="EGVV" /> The weapons were purchased from [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] gunrunners.<ref name="DEII-5" />
